Name: Dr. Nimal Perera
College Name: University of Colombo Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Nimal Perera is a senior cardiologist with over 15 years of service at the National Hospital. He is well known for his contributions to cardiovascular health in Sri Lanka.

Name: Dr. Malithi Fernando
College Name: University of Kelaniya Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Malithi Fernando specializes in pediatrics and child health. She is recognized for her compassionate care and innovative approaches in neonatal medicine.

Name: Dr. Ruwan Jayasinghe
College Name: University of Peradeniya Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Ruwan Jayasinghe is a leading neurologist in Sri Lanka with expertise in treating epilepsy and stroke patients.

Name: Dr. Anusha Weerasinghe
College Name: University of Sri Jayewardenepura Faculty of Medical Sciences
Biography: Dr. Anusha Weerasinghe is a dermatologist with special focus on cosmetic dermatology and skin cancer management.

Name: Dr. Chathura Silva
College Name: University of Colombo Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Chathura Silva is an experienced orthopedic surgeon with expertise in joint replacement and trauma care.

Name: Dr. Tharushi Abeysekera
College Name: University of Ruhuna Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Tharushi Abeysekera is a consultant oncologist with special interest in chemotherapy and patient counseling.

Name: Dr. Sandun Rajapaksha
College Name: University of Kelaniya Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Sandun Rajapaksha is a psychiatrist specializing in depression, anxiety, and substance use disorders.

Name: Dr. Menaka Jayawardena
College Name: University of Colombo Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Menaka Jayawardena specializes in endocrinology with focus on diabetes and thyroid disorders.

Name: Dr. Harsha Gunawardena
College Name: University of Peradeniya Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Harsha Gunawardena is a consultant gastroenterologist with expertise in liver and digestive system diseases.

Name: Dr. Dilani Ranasinghe
College Name: University of Jaffna Faculty of Medicine
Biography: Dr. Dilani Ranasinghe is a pulmonologist specializing in asthma, COPD, and respiratory infections.
